# descope_outbound_app (Resource)

Manages a custom OAuth outbound application in a Descope project.

The `client_secret` attribute is write-only: Terraform sends it to Descope but never stores it in state, and Descope never returns it. Omitting `client_secret` on update preserves the existing secret. Imported apps therefore leave the secret unmanaged until `client_secret` is configured.

## Example Usage

```hcl
variable "outbound_app_client_secret" {
  type      = string
  sensitive = true
}

resource "descope_outbound_app" "example" {
  project_id        = "<project-id>"
  name              = "Example API"
  description       = "OAuth access to the Example API"
  client_id         = "<oauth-client-id>"
  client_secret     = var.outbound_app_client_secret
  authorization_url = "https://example.com/oauth/authorize"
  token_url         = "https://example.com/oauth/token"
  default_scopes    = ["openid", "profile"]
}
```

Import using `project_id/app_id`:

```shell
terraform import descope_outbound_app.example <project-id>/<app-id>
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A name for the outbound app.
- `project_id` (String) The ID of the Descope project this outbound app belongs to.

### Optional

- `access_type` (String) The OAuth access type. Supported values are `offline` and `online`.
- `authorization_url` (String) The OAuth authorization endpoint.
- `authorization_url_params` (Attributes List) Additional parameters sent to the authorization endpoint. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--authorization_url_params))
- `callback_domain` (String) The callback domain used for the OAuth redirect.
- `client_id` (String) The OAuth client ID. The backend may populate this value when it is omitted.
- `default_redirect_url` (String) The default redirect URL used after authorization.
- `default_scopes` (Set of String) The scopes requested by default.
- `description` (String) A description for the outbound app.
- `discovery_url` (String) The OpenID Connect discovery endpoint.
- `logo` (String) A URL or data URI for the outbound app logo.
- `pkce` (Boolean) Whether the outbound app uses PKCE.
- `prompt` (Set of String) The OAuth prompt values sent during authorization.
- `revocation_url` (String) The OAuth token revocation endpoint.
- `token_url` (String) The OAuth token endpoint.
- `token_url_params` (Attributes List) Additional parameters sent to the token endpoint. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--token_url_params))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The stable ID of the outbound app.

### Write-Only

- `client_secret` (String, Sensitive) The OAuth client secret. This write-only value is never returned by Descope or stored in Terraform state. Omitting it during an update preserves the existing secret; imported resources leave it unmanaged until configured.

<a id="nestedatt--authorization_url_params"></a>
### Nested Schema for `authorization_url_params`

Required:

- `key` (String) The request parameter name.
- `value` (String) The request parameter value.

<a id="nestedatt--token_url_params"></a>
### Nested Schema for `token_url_params`

Required:

- `key` (String) The request parameter name.
- `value` (String) The request parameter value.
